name: Pine Harbor
short_description: Pine Harbor was a small fishing town on the shores of the North Atlantic Ocean, surrounded by cliffs and dense pine forests, shrouded in thick fog. But everything changed as a result of a technological disaster. Explore the town, help its residents, and delve into the depths of the dark forests.
detailed_description:
Explore the foggy town of Pine Harbor and its surroundings.
Gather resources, craft equipment that will help you survive another night.
Help the survivors of the city, uncover their secrets and stories.
Dive into the depths of the dark forests, face the consequences of a horrific catastrophe.
about_the_game:
Explore the foggy town of Pine Harbor and its surroundings.
Gather resources, craft equipment that will help you survive another night.
Help the survivors of the city, uncover their secrets and stories.

supported_languages:
English*, Russian, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Portuguese - Brazil, Polish, Japanese, Turkish, Arabic, Hungarian
*languages with full audio support
